title: thymus atlanticus var. brevidens
intro: Thymus atlanticus var. brevidens, also known as the short-leaved thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thymus atlanticus var. brevidens include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
